strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source founder
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise
Title is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level scope or influence
Lacks cloud-platform strategy experience advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI domain depth and recognition
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectation

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship and recent agentic/MCP exposure, but the role demands Director-level IC gravitas, recognized AI expertise, and cloud-platform strategy chops that the resume does not evidence. AI work appears nascent rather than foundational, and there is no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping platform direction at scale.
